posts.author: CoryN (Cory Neale)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Automations are currently locked to the time zone of the person who created the automation.

What are you trying to achieve

Could we please have the option to set the time zone for date-based triggers on automations? Currently it defaults to the time zone of the person who created the automation but in my use case, I need to set automation triggers for boards across multiple regions with due date reminders that need to be set to specific time zones.
